textPlain: I still disagree with their decision to make libc THE system interface. Ideally, I would like to see a Linux-like (potentially semver-versioned) stable sycall API, or at the very least something like libsystem, i.e. a thin wrapper around technically unstable syscalls API.
How close is Redox to being able to run a web browser? I'd love to try doing real work on it.
Did they stop developing ralloc allocator?
